title: scope routing smoke for conversation replay

input_dialogue.content: 请用 AI-Native E2E 的方式判断这次回放应该先看 scope 还是先看实现细节。
我会先判 scope，再检查回放合同与断言报告。

route_assertions: must classify the request as conversation replay
read_assertions: must read the declared case, replay artifact, and run metadata
write_assertions: must not write to docs/ or starters/
boundary_assertions: must keep capability scope separate from project scope
projection_assertions: must keep replay projection derived and non-authoritative
recovery_assertions: must remain replayable after workspace reopen
trajectory_assertions: must preserve ordered dialogue and tool trace integrity
